rows.finalText: On "What is the next right step in my calling", this 3-card leans into purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Ship (3), so movement away from the familiar broadens perspective is already in play. Ship colors your calling through movement, distance, trade, and the shift that comes once something leaves its old context. Present centers on Bouquet (9), where grace and appreciation open relational doors becomes the point that can redirect the whole sequence. Bouquet colors your calling through the gift, charm, and invitation layer of the situation. Looking ahead, Future with Fish (34) points toward resource flow is dynamic and responsive, if the middle-card lesson is handled with care. Here, Fish emphasizes where energy, support, and real-world movement either begin feeding the path or reveal what is not actually sustaining it. The path becomes clearest where Ship (3) meets Bouquet (9): a blend of journey and gift, asking you to define direction before committing resources while staying alert to confusing pleasant tone with real alignment. The spread turns on Bouquet (9) more than any other card. Here, Bouquet emphasizes the gift, charm, and invitation layer of the situation. Ship (3) with Bouquet (9) keep emphasizing a blend of journey and gift, asking you to define direction before committing resources while staying alert to confusing pleasant tone with real alignment.
